title: Fluffy Savory Indian Haddock Sambhar
description: A delicious and aromatic Indian-inspired sambhar dish featuring haddock, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The fluffy texture and bold flavors make it a standout among other sambhar recipes.

ingredients.name: oil
ingredients.notes: use a neutral-tasting oil like canola or grapeseed

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut2 until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the diced tomatoes, tamarind paste, red chili powder, garam masala, and salt. Mix well.
Add the haddock fillets and fold the mixture over to coat the fish evenly.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-12 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Stir in the curry leaves and coriander leaves. Season with salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional coriander leaves if desired.
Garnish with a dollop of raita, if desired, for a cooling contrast.
